textByHash.42a21c98ad588b27f4205c410d837209f9586fcc: Oh no, but as someone that makes small soft versions of creatures, this is the place to be.
textByHash.8b36fabab173cc1e6cbf6e19c38ad2a36b4b833a: These books and the hunters' reports all contain lovely details about my subject matter. I might never leave!
textByHash.8e7109d325de2197b9929b61e2531aafbd1e4537: The cat is a great way to stress test some of the stitching too. He loves having something to play with!
